440:  * "\0-\x1F\x7F-\x9F" are Unicode control characters, which includes every
441:  * space character except " ".

445:  *    ("), ">", "=", or "/"
446:  *  * Followed by zero or more space characters
447:  *  * Followed by "="
448:  *  * Followed by zero or more space characters
